description: فحص سريع للمجلدات الأكثر استهلاكاً: Temp, Windows Update, Downloads, سلة المحذوفات
command_preview: echo === TEMP FOLDERS === & dir /s /a C:\Windows\Temp 2>nul | findstr /i "File(s)" & dir /s /a C:\Users\pc\AppData\Local\Temp 2>nul | findstr /i "File(s)" & echo === WINDOWS UPDATE === & dir /s /a C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\Download 2>nul | findstr /i "File(s)" & echo === RECENT DOWNLOADS === & dir /o-d C:\Users\pc\Downloads 2>nul | more +1 & echo === RECYCLE BIN === & dir /s /a C:\$Recycle.Bin 2>nul | findstr /i "File(s)"
output:
=== TEMP FOLDERS === 
=== WINDOWS UPDATE === 
=== RECENT DOWNLOADS === 
=== RECYCLE BIN ===
